The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH.PSAP systems may not render emojis/special characters correctly. Return messages will not be affected.Two-way text with the user is now available.[18:03:44 GMT-07:00 21 Mar 2026] (281) 932-1363: SYSTEM: We received your 9-1-1 text message. Need ambulance.[18:03:44 GMT-07:00 21 Mar 2026] (281) 932-1363: This Emergency SOS via satellite session was transferred to the Emergency Relay Center because no PSAP response was received. You may receive or have received a relay voice call for an incident with this same location data. Please verify that your TCC connection and text handling systems are functioning normally, and that dispatchers are logged in to receive texts to avoid relay fallback for future Emergency SOS via satellite sessions.
